settings.heading: Early 2000
settings.text: The notion of affordable glass railing for the average homeowner once seemed far-fetched, as it was typically reserved for high-end custom homes. However, the owners recognized that this had to change.

Opening our first glass railing panel retail outlet in Marieville, Quebec was a pivotal moment. Despite its modest 7,000 sq. ft. size, our commitment to quality and service set us apart, paving the way for further expansion.

Expanding into Laval marked our second location's opening, reinforcing our market presence and dedication to excellence and top-notch customer service. We transitioned primarily to a B2B-focused approach.

Our third location in Saint-Julie, with a 30,000 sq. ft. warehouse, is a significant milestone. We've established the largest distribution centre for glass railing panels and hardware to meet the increasing demand.

RF Transparent reaches a pivotal milestone with our fourth location in Toronto. As the largest distributor in Ontario and Quebec, we're dedicated to making premium glass railing systems affordable and accessible.

Today, our products are available at nearly every building supply store across the nation. We've come a long way from the days when glass railing was out of reach for many. We take pride in making a meaningful impact in our community.

settings.feature: Guided directly to your nearest dealer

settings.heading: Get Your Personalized Quote
settings.text: Tell us about your project and we'll connect you with your nearest authorized dealer.
